Title: The Smile: Friend of a Friend
Haim: Valentine
Plot: Music video by HAIM performing 'Something To Tell You,' 'Nothing's Wrong' and 'Right Now'

Title: Aimee Mann: Save Me
Plot: Paul Thomas Anderson-directed music video of Aimee Mann's Academy Award-nominated song. Shot during production of Anderson's 'Magnolia' and featuring the film's ensemble cast.

Title: Haim: Little of Your Love
Plot: "Little of Your Love" is a song by Haim and the second single off their second album, Something to Tell You. It was released as the follow-up to the single "Want You Back" on June 18, 2017. The music video for the song was directed by Paul Thomas Anderson. The video was released on October 2, 2017 and features the group line dancing with patrons at the Oil Can Harry's bar in Los Angeles.

Title: Joanna Newsom: Sapokanikan
Plot: Music Video for Joanna Newsom's song Sapokanikan. This song is the first single from her fourth studio album entitled 'Divers'.

Title: Haim: Summer Girl
Plot: Official music video for "Summer Girl" by Haim.

Title: Michael Penn: Try
Plot: Music video for Michael Penn's 'Try', shot by Paul Thomas Anderson and other cast and crew from 'Boogie Nights' in a single take in the longest hall-way in North America.

Title: Fiona Apple: Paper Bag
Plot: Paul Thomas Anderson-directed music video for Fiona Apple's single. An homage to 1940s musical numbers, featuring twenty choreographed young boys.
